title: holcosorus setaceus
intro: Holcosorus setaceus, also known as the prickly stick or devil's thorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Holcosorus setaceus include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, lower blood pressure, and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Holcosorus setaceus can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to create teas, salves, and other topical applications.
